name: Smokedope2016
description: '''Smokedope2016''' (born May 28, 2001; stylized in [[letter case|all lowercase]]) is an American rapper and record producer from [[Virginia Beach, Virginia]]. He is known for obscuring his face in promotional material and in the public and being private about his personal life. Starting in 2022, he has released seven studio albums; his music has been compared to that of [[Yung Lean]] and [[Clams Casino (musician)|Clams Casino]].
